messages.content: Build a dashboard ViewModel in RxJS v7+ using combineLatest with typed inputs (user, cart, theme). Use the object form and declare the ViewModel interface.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to combine two streams into a typed tuple view model? Show a minimal example using the array form.
Implement a typed search page ViewModel in RxJS v7+ with strict types — no any, discriminated union for loading/ready states, and the combineLatest object form.
Explain briefly how combineLatest works in RxJS v7+, then show a working typed ViewModel implementation.
Write an RxJS v7+ typed ViewModel that merges filters, sort order, and the raw rows into a ready-to-render list. Constraints: strict types, combineLatest object form, no any.

Fix this RxJS snippet so it returns a properly typed Observable using the v7+ combineLatest object form:

```ts
combineLatest([a$, b$]).subscribe(([a, b]) => render(a, b));
```
Show me the RxJS v7+ equivalent of the pre-v7 `combineLatest(a$, b$, c$)` rest-argument form. Brief typed example.
Build a typed checkout ViewModel in RxJS v7+ using combineLatest that combines cart, shipping, payment, and coupon streams.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to derive a typed `isSubmitDisabled` flag from form-fields and a submitting flag with combineLatest? Minimal example.
Explain briefly how combineLatest handles first emission timing in RxJS v7+, then show a typed implementation for a settings panel VM.
Write an RxJS v7+ function that derives a typed connection-banner VM from an online flag, a queued-messages count, and a user stream. Constraints: combineLatest object form, discriminated VM, no any.
Build a typed pricing page ViewModel in RxJS v7+ driven by two BehaviorSubjects (selected plan, seats) combined via combineLatest.
Implement a typed player ViewModel in RxJS v7+ — strict types, no any, combineLatest object form. Inputs: current track, play state, volume.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to combine two streams into a typed label string? Show the smallest working example.
Build a typed route-guard ViewModel in RxJS v7+ that combines an auth stream with a route stream using combineLatest.
Explain briefly the difference between combineLatest and forkJoin, then show a typed combineLatest ViewModel example in RxJS v7+.
Build a typed user-profile loader in RxJS v7+ using forkJoin to run three independent HTTP-like observables in parallel and emit once all complete.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to fetch three endpoints in parallel and get one typed combined result? Show a minimal example with forkJoin.
Implement a parallel-load bundle in RxJS v7+ with strict types — forkJoin object form, a typed result interface, no any.
Explain briefly how forkJoin works in RxJS v7+, then show a working typed implementation that loads three things in parallel.
Write an RxJS v7+ function that loads a product page bundle in parallel. Constraints: forkJoin object form, strict types, surface errors from any failing source.

Fix this RxJS code to use the v7+ forkJoin object form and a typed result:

```ts
forkJoin([a$, b$]).subscribe(([a, b]) => done({ a, b }));
```

Add a fourth parallel source (`notifications$`) to this RxJS v7+ forkJoin bundle loader, keeping strict types:

```ts
forkJoin({ user: user$, settings: settings$, badges: badges$ });
```

Refactor this RxJS v7+ pipeline to use the forkJoin object form, a typed bundle interface, and no any:

```ts
forkJoin([a$, b$, c$]).pipe(map(([a, b, c]) => ({ a, b, c })));
```
Show me the RxJS v7+ equivalent of the pre-v7 `forkJoin(a$, b$, c$)` rest-argument form. Brief typed example.
Build a typed splash-screen loader in RxJS v7+ using forkJoin with the array form and a tuple-destructuring map.
Write an RxJS v7+ function that loads an analytics dashboard bundle. Constraints: forkJoin object form, typed discriminated result, strict types.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to run an arbitrary list of HTTP requests in parallel and wait for all? Show a typed example with forkJoin.
Build a typed settings-bootstrap loader in RxJS v7+ that runs three independent loads in parallel with forkJoin, and retries each branch up to 2 times.
Explain briefly why putting a BehaviorSubject into forkJoin will hang, then show a typed RxJS v7+ implementation that only uses completing sources.
Implement a typed RxJS v7+ function that loads an order summary for N orderIds in parallel with forkJoin and returns a Record<id, Summary>.

Add a fourth parallel source (`permissions$`) to this RxJS v7+ forkJoin bundle and keep strict types:

```ts
forkJoin({ user: user$, org: org$, billing: billing$ });
```
Explain briefly when to reach for forkJoin over combineLatest in RxJS v7+, then show a typed forkJoin example for a one-shot parallel load.
What's the RxJS v7+ way to run two HTTP-like observables in parallel and get a typed pair back? Minimal example.
Write an RxJS v7+ function that loads a settings bundle by taking a single value from three long-lived streams. Constraints: forkJoin object form, use take(1) to ensure completion, strict types.
